internships.description: Worked as part of the Data & GenAI team, contributing to backend development and system modernization. Developed and maintained ABAP-based backend services and worked with SAP S/4HANA. Also supported Java applications in migration to newer versions. Additionally, worked on a code analyzer project and built responsive React components for a SaaS platform.
highlights: Contributed to Data & GenAI team projects
Worked on ABAP backend and SAP S/4HANA systems
Developed features for a code analyzer

internships.description: Focused on backend optimization and performance improvements, enhancing system efficiency and reliability.
highlights: Reduced API response time by 30% through service-layer refactoring
Optimized database indexing and improved slow endpoints
Integrated TypeScript to reduce runtime errors

internships.description: Actively mentored students in Data Structures & Algorithms and competitive programming. Guided learners in problem-solving techniques, contest strategies, and building strong fundamentals. Shared knowledge through structured explanations and content to simplify complex topics.
highlights: Mentored students on DSA and competitive programming concepts
Guided learners in solving real contest problems
Explained complex topics in a simplified and structured way
Helped peers improve problem-solving and coding efficiency

professional.description: Worked across multiple domains including Data Engineering, GenAI, and Backend Development. Contributed to large-scale enterprise solutions involving SAP systems, real-time data pipelines, and AI-driven developer tools used across the organization.
highlights: Worked as a Data Engineer on SAP HANA, migrating enterprise data to cloud for real-time analytics and reporting
Used Power BI for DQMS operations and data quality monitoring
Built a GenAI-powered code analyzer using React, Flask, and RAG pipelines, currently used by teams and thousands of employees
Integrated vector databases and Azure Blob Storage for scalable data retrieval and storage
Designed a persistence caching system to optimize repeated AI analysis and improve performance
Integrated code editor and AI tools to provide real-time feedback and faster developer workflows
Worked on ABAP backend development and contributed to Java-based system upgrades
